headline: What to Do When the Insurance Adjuster Starts Calling
articleBody: When you’re hurt in a company vehicle or on a job site, the insurance company will call you fast. Be careful: they're looking for reasons to pay you less. Give them the basics, but don't sign anything or give a recorded statement until you've talked to someone on your side. Need a hand navigating the fine print? Just Work Comp Law focuses solely on these messy situations.
